metadata.title: Xpandia | Spanish-English Language Assurance & Applied Cultural Intelligence
metadata.description: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact Spanish and English experiences through expert human review, quality evidence, and cultural insight.
metadata.ogTitle: Xpandia | Spanish-English Language Assurance & Applied Cultural Intelligence
metadata.ogDescription: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact Spanish and English experiences through expert human review, quality evidence, and cultural insight.

items.label: Language Assurance
items.desc: Validate Spanish before your users do.

items.label: Language Experience Repair & Adaptation
items.desc: Improve Spanish that needs to work for real users.

items.label: Applied Cultural Intelligence
items.desc: Make better decisions with cultural context.

footer.tagline: Spanish and English that work for real users.
footer.description: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, and digital product teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact digital experiences for English and Spanish-speaking audiences.
